thinking.text:
Now I have a good understanding of the referral program. Let me analyze the user's situation:

Looking at their referrals, the most recent one is:
- 11/13/2025 - Silver Rewards Card - IN_PROGRESS

This is likely the referral they're asking about. The status "IN_PROGRESS" means the referred person has successfully opened a new account and is working toward meeting the qualifying spend requirement.

According to the knowledge base:
- IN_PROGRESS: No action required; monitor until criteria are met.

The user mentioned their friend has been using the card, so they're probably working toward meeting the spending requirement. I should explain this to the user and let them know that the bonus will be issued once their friend meets the qualifying spend requirement.

Let me also check if there's any specific information about the Silver Rewards Card referral requirements.

tool_calls.Name: KB_search_bm25
tool_calls.Arguments: {"query": "Silver Rewards Card referral bonus qualifying spend requirement"}
